params.name: Cupid and Psyche
params.description:
On Oct 30, 1796 AD, Canova made the sculpture based on Ancient Greek myths.
Cupid and Psyche is the masterpiece of sculptor Canova. The sculpture depicts the moment Cupid kisses his love. Legend has it, Venus was envious of Psyche's gorgeous face, and secretly sent her son Cupid against her. Unexpectedly, though, Cupid fell in love with her. They were separated because Psyche's sisters were jealous. But through numerous hardships, they were finally together as a couple. The sculpture depicts …
